calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-06-2019 Off Calendar

Notice Of Default Judgment Prove Up Hearing And Request For Attorneys Fees And Costs
Off Calendar Jan-15-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant Kelly D. Stevens, an individual.
Dept. 514. Judge: A. James Robertson, II. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Mitch L. Lyon, CSR #6840. Telephone: 415-551-3703.

Thomas W. Chaffee, Esq. appeared for plaintiff the Palms San Francisco Owners' Association.
Veronica Nguyen, General Manager for plaintiff, was placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by defaulted defendant Kelly D. Stevens, an individual.
Plaintiff's complaint for Breach of the CCR's and Common Counts was filed on September 28, 2017, and personally served on defendant Kelly D. Stevens on February 15, 2018.
Default as to defendant Kelly D. Stevens, an individual, was entered on April 17, 2018.
DOE defendants were dismissed on October 24, 2018.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff the Palms San Francisco Owners' Association, and against the defaulted defendant, Kelly D. Stevens, an individual, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $82,725.77.
Prejudgment Interest on Assessments @ 12% - $13,082.40.
Attorney Fees - $13,961.57.
Costs - $1,499.70.

Total - $111,269.44.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-18-2018 Continued To Feb-26-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
